prompt: Show a settings card with three notification preference switches: 'Email notifications' (on by default), 'Push notifications', and 'SMS notifications'.
reference:
import { Card } from '@tale-ui/react/card';
import { Column } from '@tale-ui/react/column';
import { Row } from '@tale-ui/react/row';
import { Text } from '@tale-ui/react/text';
import { Switch } from '@tale-ui/react/switch';

export function Example() {
  return (
    <Card.Root>
      <Card.Header>
        <Text variant="title" size="m">Notification Preferences</Text>
      </Card.Header>
      <Card.Body>
        <Column gap="m">
          <Row justify="between" align="center">
            <Text variant="text" size="m">Email notifications</Text>
            <Switch.Root defaultSelected>
              <Switch.Thumb />
            </Switch.Root>
          </Row>
          <Row justify="between" align="center">
            <Text variant="text" size="m">Push notifications</Text>
            <Switch.Root>
              <Switch.Thumb />
            </Switch.Root>
          </Row>
          <Row justify="between" align="center">
            <Text variant="text" size="m">SMS notifications</Text>
            <Switch.Root>
              <Switch.Thumb />
            </Switch.Root>
          </Row>
        </Column>
      </Card.Body>
    </Card.Root>
  );
}
